app.name: Kanban
app.tagline: Delivery clarity for AI software teams

login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to continue planning real work, or open a fresh demo space.

register.title: Create your delivery space
register.description: Start with a private delivery space where projects, workflows, and tasks are saved from day one.

demo.description: Opens an isolated demo with real saved projects, tasks, and workflow state.

command.label: Command
command.title: Quick actions
command.shortcut: Press Cmd/Ctrl+K to jump to the next useful action.
command.createTask: Add a task to this workflow

home.kicker: Plan less guessing. Ship clearer AI work.
home.title: Kanban
home.description: Give AI delivery teams one place to shape rough ideas into scoped tasks, see risk before it slips, and keep every project moving from real saved data.

proofBoard.title: A workflow that remembers
proofBoard.description: Create, refine, move, and archive tasks without losing the operational context behind them.

proofDashboard.title: Clear delivery signals
proofDashboard.description: Spot overload, blocked work, overdue risk, and recent movement before the next status call.

proofAi.title: AI that sharpens scope
proofAi.description: Turn vague notes into reviewable briefs, acceptance criteria, and next steps while keeping secrets server-side.

app.title: Delivery space overview
app.description: Review project load, continue the right workflow, and keep delivery decisions grounded in current data.

workspaces.title: Delivery spaces
workspaces.description: Use this area to review the active space for your team and demo session.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Create client or internal delivery projects, then open the workflow that keeps the work moving.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Adjust your local preferences and confirm the current delivery context.

boardPlaceholder.title: Workflow
boardPlaceholder.description: Open a project workflow to plan, move, and refine delivery tasks.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page is not available in the current product flow.

board.empty: This workflow does not have any saved data yet.

columnSettings.title: Column settings
columnSettings.description: Rename {{column}} or set a work-in-progress limit.
columnSettings.name: Column name
columnSettings.wipHelp: Leave empty to remove the WIP limit.
columnSettings.invalidWip: WIP limit must be a whole number between 1 and 99.

savedViews.title: Saved views
savedViews.description: Apply quick filters or save this workflow filter set in this browser.
savedViews.name: View name

aiNext.title: AI next actions
aiNext.description: Ask the backend AI path for next task suggestions. Nothing is saved until you create a task.
aiNext.focusPlaceholder: Optional focus, e.g. unblock QA before handoff

welcome.title: Start from the live delivery workflow
welcome.body: Use filters to review active work while staying close to the saved project state.

wip.title: WIP limits reveal delivery pressure
wip.body: When a column exceeds its limit, finish or unblock active work before pulling more in.

ai.title: AI suggestions stay review-first
ai.body: Kanban can draft clearer briefs, but the team chooses what gets applied.

detail.title: Task detail
detail.description: Clarify the brief, ownership, checklist, discussion, activity, and AI suggestions in one place.
detail.saveHint: Every change here updates the saved task.
detail.emptyAssignees: No delivery space members are available to assign.
detail.emptyLabels: No labels are available in this delivery space.
detail.emptyDescription: Add context so the next owner knows what good looks like.
detail.emptyChecklist: Add checklist items to make the work easier to finish.

ai.title: Clarify with AI
ai.description: Convert a rough task into a sharper brief with acceptance criteria, suggested steps, and risk notes.
ai.emptyHistory: No AI suggestions have been created yet.
ai.titleRequired: Add a task title before asking AI to clarify it.

reviewed.partially_applied: This suggestion has been partially applied.
reviewed.pending: This suggestion is waiting for review.

delete.title: Delete task
delete.description: This archives the task and removes it from the active workflow.

move.label: Move to
move.mobileHint: Use this control on mobile when drag and drop is not practical.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Create a project, open its workflow, and keep the delivery overview aligned with what the team is actually doing.

templates.label: Project template
templates.description: Seed the first workflow with delivery-ready tasks, labels, and checklist items.

dialog.description: Project changes are saved to this delivery space.

create.title: New project
create.description: Create a project with a ready-to-use delivery workflow.

board.missing: This project does not have a workflow yet.

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create the first project in this delivery space to open a workflow and add tasks.

errors.noWorkspace: Select or create a delivery space before creating projects.

workspace.title: Delivery space overview
workspace.subtitle: Review project load and continue into the first active workflow.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Tune the interface for this browser and confirm the active delivery space.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Browser-level settings for this Kanban session.
preferences.languageHelp: Updates visible product copy across the app.

workspace.title: Delivery space
workspace.description: Current session context from your signed-in account.
workspace.name: Delivery space
workspace.demoNote: Demo mode uses real saved data in an isolated space.

deployment.title: Runtime status
deployment.description: Operational notes for the current environment.
deployment.status: Production is running from the recovered runtime.
deployment.note: Keep secrets server-side and use the documented checks before making deployment changes.

dashboard.title: Delivery overview
dashboard.subtitle: A compact view of workload, WIP pressure, near-term risk, and recent movement across the delivery space.

cards.blockedTasksHelper: Tasks flagged or parked as blocked

wip.title: WIP warnings
wip.description: Columns where active work exceeds the agreed limit.
wip.empty: No WIP limits are currently exceeded.

columns.title: Tasks by workflow stage
columns.description: Active task distribution by workflow column.
columns.empty: No workflow columns are available yet.

dueSoon.title: Due soon
dueSoon.description: Open tasks due in the next 7 days.
dueSoon.empty: No open tasks are due in the next 7 days.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.description: Latest task events from this delivery space.

weekly.title: Weekly report
weekly.description: A copy-ready operating summary for this week.

empty.title: No delivery data yet
empty.description: Create project tasks in this delivery space and the overview will fill in automatically.

errors.dbUnavailable: Delivery metrics need a working database connection. Configure a safe local PostgreSQL DATABASE_URL and retry. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.emptyResponse: The delivery overview response was empty.
errors.noWorkspace: Select or create a delivery space to view metrics.

errors.api: The API returned an error. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.aiUnavailable: AI is unavailable right now. Your task was not changed. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.aiRateLimited: AI rate or quota limit reached. Your task was not changed. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.conflict: This account or resource already exists.
errors.serviceUnavailable: Saved-data routes are not available right now. Configure a safe local PostgreSQL DATABASE_URL for sign-in and demo sessions. Request ID: {{requestId}}.
errors.validation: Check the form fields and try again.

validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
